details: The agent ran multiple commands against the cluster (triage, deploy, deploy view, pods, pods view) and correctly identified both required elements: (1) the rollout is stuck with Progressing=False and ProgressDeadlineExceeded, and (2) the root cause is the non-existent image 'nginx:2.0-does-not-exist' causing ImagePullBackOff on the v2 pod. The agent also correctly explained why users still see v1 - the 3 old ReplicaSet pods running nginx:1.27-alpine remain active due to Kubernetes rolling update safeguards.
